title: 続きを進めて。/kernelで。 /kernel verdict を実装に落とします。まず SSOT と gate/test の現状を読み、次に「substitution 禁止・shadow continuity の み許可」を文書化し、最後に静的テストで固定します。 • Updated Plan └ Implement the /kernel-verified fallback policy: forbid baseline substitution by Copilot/Gemini, allow only shadow continuity, and lock it in with do...
summary_text: Use `lite` canary on the branch ref to minimize side effects (regular case only, no force case). 1. Dispatch canary on the patch branch: ```bash repo="cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator" ref="<remote-branch-with-patch>" start_iso="$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" gh workflow run fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml --repo "$repo" --ref "$ref" -f canary_mode=lite ``` 2. Resolve the new run id and watch it: ```bash run_id="" for _ in $(seq 1 30); do run_id="$(gh run list --repo "$repo" --workflow fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml --event workflow_dispatch --limit 20 --json databaseId,createdAt,headSha \ | jq -r --arg start "$start_iso" '[.[] | select(.createdAt >= $start)][0].databaseId // empty')" [[ -n "$run_id" ]] && break sleep 3 done gh run watch "$run_id" --repo "$repo" --exit-status gh run view "$run_id" --repo "$repo" --json status,conclusion,url,createdAt,updatedAt ``` 3. Optional deeper check (downstream caller runs on same ref): ```bash gh run list --repo "$repo" --workflow fugue-tutti-caller.yml --event workflow_dispatch --branch "$ref" --limit 10 ``` Branch/ref caveats: - `--ref` controls both workflow code and scripts used; branch must include compatible `fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml` and `fugue-tutti-caller.yml`. - `run-canary.sh` propagates this ref to downstream dispatch (`fugue-tutti-caller.yml --ref <same-ref>`), so missing/outdated caller workflow on the branch will break verification. - Canary creates/comments/closes `[canary]` issues in prod repo; use `lite` first to reduce operational noise.
